observations: Point 1: Feedback signals directly alter AdaptiveWeightEngine.get_boost() and adjusted_weights() — boost went from +0.00 to +0.05 after 15/5 split
Point 2: Adjusted weights change final_score computation in HybridRetriever.rank() — score delta = -0.015500 (-3.9241%)
Point 3: Weight changes propagate to QueryPlanner via calibration_provider — 1/20 queries had confidence shifts (5.0%)
Causality chain: FEEDBACK → WEIGHTS (Δboost=0.05) → CONTEXT (score Δ=-0.015500) → PLAN (5.0% confidence shift)
